findings.detail: Only one template choice, so it feels like there’s not much room to pick a style that fits my business.
findings.proposed_solution: Show a few more template options so I can compare looks without feeling boxed in.

findings.detail: Three color palettes is nice, but it still feels a bit limited if I want the site to feel more personal.
findings.proposed_solution: Offer a clearer starting walkthrough like 'pick a style, then edit text, then save/publish'.

findings.detail: The editor seems to work, but from a non-technical point of view I may need a bit more guidance on what to do first.
findings.proposed_solution: Add quick preview examples for each palette so I can tell which one matches a wellness brand fast.

warnings.detail: Only one template choice, so it feels like there’s not much room to pick a style that fits my business.
Three color palettes is nice, but it still feels a bit limited if I want the site to feel more personal.
The editor seems to work, but from a non-technical point of view I may need a bit more guidance on what to do first.
